title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Orochi, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #4 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't help but sigh! What tone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wonder... whenever sister plays this song,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why does she wear a mask?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We will ask you only once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you speak true, you will die a painless death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you lie, excruciating torture awaits you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are you, and what are you doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm tracking the flow of money inside the flower capital.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: ox-three boy just appeared in the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad I made a clone just in case.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ninjustsu or fairy magic, it matters not. Her real body should be somewhere nearby.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
